basic_details.job_title: Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh High Court has officially released the Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 03/2026) for 20 vacancies across Chhattisgarh. Eligible candidates holding a Bachelor’s Degree in Library Science and aged between 21 to 30 years (up to 45 years with applicable relaxations for Chhattisgarh residents) can apply offline from June 2026 to 20 July 2026 via the official website/notification process. Selected candidates will be appointed on a full-time basis with a monthly salary ranging from ₹19,500 to ₹62,000.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 30 years (40 years for Chhattisgarh residents). Max 45 years with all relaxations.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation for Chhattisgarh residents: Maximum 40 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC (Chhattisgarh): 5 years Age relaxation for Women (Local Residents of Chhattisgarh): 10 years Age relaxation for Government Servants: 5 years (additional) Age relaxation for Physically Disabled Persons: As per Govt. of Chhattisgarh GAD circular dated 27.09.2014 Overall Maximum Age (with all relaxations): 45 years

qualification.details: Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant): Bachelor's Degree in Library Science from any recognized University.

salary_details.details: Level-4 of Pay Matrix Pay Scale: 19500-62000

selection_process: Phase-I Written Test Phase-II Skill Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://highcourt.cg.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://highcourt.cg.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Chhattisgarh High Court Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) posts is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Library Science from any recognized University to be eligible for the Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 30 years. However, relaxations are applicable for Chhattisgarh residents and reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Library Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for the post of Library Assistant (Junior Judicial Assistant) in the Chhattisgarh High Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Library Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed in Level-4 of the Pay Matrix, with a salary scale ranging from ₹19,500 to ₹62,000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via Speed Post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Phase-I Written Test followed by a Phase-II Skill Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Chhattisgarh High Court: https://highcourt.cg.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent by Speed Post only to the Registrar General, High Court of Chhattisgarh, Bodri, Bilaspur (C.G.) Pin – 495 220.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available for SC/ST/OBC candidates of Chhattisgarh, women residents of Chhattisgarh, government servants, and physically disabled persons.
